title: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between MailerLite and Campaign Monitor comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple brands. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses And Freelancers On A Budget
comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses and freelancers on a budget
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands

faq.q: Is MailerLite better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite wins for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Campaign Monitor is stronger for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: MailerLite starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $11/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Campaign Monitor to MailerLite is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
